# Juan Rueda - Senior Software Engineer

Technical blog and portfolio of Juan Rueda.

## Main Sections

- [Blog](/pepefeliblu) - Technical articles on Frontend, Architecture, and Engineering.
- [About](/pepefeliblu/about) - Professional bio and background.
- [CV](/pepefeliblu/cv) - Curriculum Vitae.

## Recent Posts

- [Stickers, Ballots, and the Cost of Bad Design](/pepefeliblu/blog/the-cost-of-bad-design) - From the butterfly ballot to the Panini 2026 World Cup album: how bad design snowballs, and why 'it fits' is never proof you got it right.
- [Simple vs Complex: When to Level Up Your Solutions](/pepefeliblu/blog/simple-vs-complex) - Navigating the trade-offs between simple implementations and complex systems, illustrated by a real-world SQL Unicode problem.
- [From Startup CTO to Enterprise Tech Lead: What I Learned About Leadership](/pepefeliblu/blog/startup-cto-to-tech-lead) - A personal reflection on the transition from a startup CTO role to an enterprise Tech Lead, exploring the true meaning of technical leadership.
- [Why I Keep My Kids Away From Screens (Even Though I Work in Tech)](/pepefeliblu/blog/why-i-keep-my-kids-away-from-screens) - A tech worker's perspective on raising children in a digital age, focusing on the benefits of boredom and analog play.
- [The Mechanical Turk Redux: Why Your AI Assistant Carries a Wand](/pepefeliblu/blog/the-mechanical-turk-redux) - Why do so many AI tools use mystical imagery? From the original 18th-century illusion to today's LLMs, we explore the theatrical side of artificial intelligence.
